overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, futuristic architecture, and heavy pedestrian and vehicle traffic. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing detailed reflections on wet asphalt and vibrant neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban intersection with neon signage

events.description: exiting covered structure into open rainy intersection
turning right to follow the street direction

agents.ego_description: walking through the rainy intersection toward neon-lit buildings while avoiding traffic

entered.detail: bright red rectangular postal box near the starting position
large neon sign for pizza shop with orange and white lettering
corporate signage for Delamain mounted on building facade
multi-level highway structure with yellow trim passing overhead
tall futuristic buildings with reflective glass surfaces

segments.scene_description: Starting from a covered position near a red mailbox, the camera moves into a wide-open rainy intersection. Neon signs for 'Buck-a-Slice' and 'Delamain' illuminate the scene as vehicles pass by on the wet asphalt. The camera turns right to follow the street under the elevated highway ramp.

events.description: entering covered area beneath the elevated highway
waiting at traffic light for vehicles to pass

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass alongside other pedestrians, following a man with a purple umbrella

notable_agents.action: shirtless man with purple umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: neon sign with Japanese characters indicating hotel
tall pole with traffic signal lights and pedestrian crossing signals
curved neon light structure glowing orange and teal
large support columns for the elevated highway above

segments.scene_description: Moving under the elevated highway into a semi-covered walkway, the environment becomes more enclosed with concrete pillars lining the path. A shirtless pedestrian with a purple umbrella walks ahead, and Japanese neon signage becomes visible on the left while traffic passes on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with digital advertisements

events.description: crossing street under the covered walkway while traffic light is green

agents.ego_description: continuing through the covered pedestrian walkway following the crowd

entered.detail: glowing storefront displays with various merchandise visible
short black and yellow posts lining the edge of the walkway
large illuminated displays showing animated advertisements
linear fluorescent light fixtures running along the walkway ceiling

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian arcade with glowing shop windows on the right and protective bollards lining the street. The ceiling features linear fluorescent lights, and digital advertisements illuminate the walls as pedestrians with umbrellas move through the sheltered space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with large digital billboards

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open intersection with heavy neon lighting
crossing road at yellow-striped crosswalk toward parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: crossing the street toward a parked vehicle and large digital displays while rain continues

notable_agents.action: gold Quadra Type-66 parked on the street with hood open exposing engine

entered.detail: massive screen displaying advertisements on building facade
gold cyberpunk-style vehicle with open hood and visible engine
tall structure with blue illuminated edges and geometric design
enclosed walkway connecting buildings above the street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a vibrant open intersection dominated by large digital billboards and intense neon pink lighting. A gold Quadra Type-66 car with its hood open is parked on the right, and the camera approaches it while crossing the wet street.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with parked vehicles and neon shopfronts

events.description: slowing to examine the parked car's engine details up close
continuing walk past the vehicle down the street

agents.ego_description: approaching and examining the parked car's exposed engine before continuing down the street

entered.detail: exposed engine components with green straps and intricate mechanical parts
sleek blue vehicle parked on the left side of the street
store entrance with bright purple neon lighting

segments.scene_description: Approaching the gold Quadra Type-66 for a close-up view of its detailed engine and sticker-covered rear. After a brief examination, the camera continues past the vehicle, passing a blue sports car and moving toward more neon-lit shopfronts as the rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rainy open intersection through a series of sheltered urban corridors and back into a vibrant, neon-drenched plaza. It begins near a red mailbox, moving out into the rain past Buck-a-Slice and Delamain signs before turning right to glide under the heavy concrete pillars of an elevated highway ramp. The environment then shifts into a semi-covered pedestrian arcade, where the open street is replaced by linear fluorescent ceiling lights, glowing shop windows, and crowds of people with umbrellas. As the camera emerges from this sheltered walkway, the scene opens back up into a wide intersection dominated by intense pink digital billboards and wet asphalt. The movement finally culminates in a close-up examination of a gold Quadra Type-66 with its hood open, before continuing past a blue sports car toward the distant, glowing shopfronts.
